lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naame trisanaa agan bujhai naam milai tisai rajaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Naam, the fire of desire is extinguished; the Naam is obtained by His Will. ||1||Pause||
In the Dark Age of Kali Yuga, realize the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਕਿਆ ਦੀਜੈ ਜਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tis kiaa deejai ji sabad sunaae |
lines.english: What shall we offer to one who proclaims the Word of the Shabad?
Serving the True Guru, one becomes approved.
By this devotional worship, egotism is eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਆਸਾ ਕੀਤੀ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਜਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin aasaa keetee tis no jaan |2|
lines.english: So know the One, who created hope and desire. ||2||
By His Grace, the Naam is enshrined within our minds.
One who understands the Lord's Command finds lasting peace. ||3||
Offer your head, and shed your self-conceit.
He Himself does, and causes others to do.
He Himself misleads us, and He Himself puts us back on the Path.
He Himself enshrines His Name in the mind of the Gurmukh.
Through the True Word of the Shabad, we merge into the True Lord. ||4||
True is the Shabad, and True is the Word of the Lord's Bani.
In each and every age, the Gurmukhs speak it and chant it.
Throughout the three worlds, is the one Maya.
Without the Name, everyone wanders around insane. ||5||
The self-willed manmukhs are deluded by doubt and attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh parr parr doojaa bhaau drirraaeaa |
lines.english: The fool reads and reads, but holds tight to duality.
He performs all sorts of rituals, but still suffers terrible pain.
Serving the True Guru, eternal peace is obtained. ||6||
Reflective meditation upon the Shabad is such sweet nectar.
Night and day, one enjoys it, subduing his ego.
When the Lord showers His Mercy, we enjoy celestial bliss.
Subdue your ego and meditate on the Lord.
Imbued with the Naam, love the True Lord forever. ||7||
Meditate on the Lord, and read and reflect upon the Guru's Shabad.
O Nanak, enshrine the Naam within your heart, through the Guru's Teachings. ||8||3||25||
Meditate on the Lord, and be imbued with fear and love of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੮ ਕਾਫੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa mahalaa 3 asattapadeea ghar 8 kaafee |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Eighth House, Kaafee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur te saant aoopajai jin trisanaa agan bujhaaee |
lines.english: Peace emanates from the Guru; He puts out the fire of desire.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Keep the One Name in your consciousness, O my Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਤੁ ਜਲੰਦਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੈ ਭਜਿ ਪਏ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jagat jalandaa dekh kai bhaj pe saranaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Seeing the world on fire, I have hurried to the Lord's Sanctuary. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur te naam paaeeai vaddee vaddiaaee |1|
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is obtained from the Guru; it is the greatest greatness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur te ghar dar paaeaa bhagatee bhare bhanddaaraa |2|
lines.english: Through the Guru, the Lord's Mansion and His Court are attained; His devotional worship is overflowing with treasures. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਮਹਾ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur te giaan aoopajai mahaa tat beechaaraa |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom emanates from the Guru; reflect upon the supreme essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਲਾਹ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat salaah hai antar sabad apaaraa |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is the Lord's devotee, immersed in His Praises; the Infinite Word of the Shabad dwells within him. ||3||
The Gurmukh meditates on the Naam; he achieves reflective meditation and understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੂਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sookh aoopajai dukh kade na hoee |
lines.english: Happiness emanates from the Gurmukh; he never suffers pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh haumai maareeai man niramal hoee |4|
lines.english: The Gurmukh conquers his ego, and his mind is immaculately pure. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਆਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai aap geaa tribhavan sojhee paaee |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, self-conceit is removed, and understanding of the three worlds is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋਤਿ ਪਸਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: niramal jot pasar rahee jotee jot milaaee |5|
lines.english: The Immaculate Divine Light is pervading and permeating everywhere; one's light merges into the Light. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: antar seetal saant hoe naame sukh hoee |6|
lines.english: A cooling and soothing peace comes within, and through the Naam, peace is obtained. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਮਝਾਇਆ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: poorai gur samajhaaeaa mat aootam hoee |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru instructs, and one's intellect becomes sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਸਭ ਕਟੀਅਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kilavikh paap sabh katteeeh fir dukh bighan na hoee |7|
lines.english: All sins and vices are eradicated, and one shall never again suffer pain or distress. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਾਂ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਾਂ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur taan milai jaan nadar kareee |
lines.english: One meets the Perfect True Guru only when the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace.
